title: mikania ovalis
intro: Mikania ovalis, also known as Java tea or hairy mint, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Mikania ovalis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome. Mikania ovalis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the plant's active compounds using a solvent.
